rules.name: Skilled Crews
rules.description: Ranged weapons equipped by AELDARI VEHICLE models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and you can re-roll Advance rolls made for AELDARI VEHICLE units from your army that have the FLY keyword.

stratagems.name: Layered Wards
stratagems.description: Use in any phase, just after a mortal wound is allocated to an AELDARI VEHICLE model from your army. Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.

stratagems.name: Swift Deployment
stratagems.description: Use in your Movement phase. Target one AELDARI TRANSPORT unit from your army. Until the end of the phase, units can disembark from your TRANSPORT after it has Advanced. Units that do so count as having made a Normal move that phase, and cannot declare a charge in the same turn, but can otherwise act normally.

stratagems.name: Vectored Engines
stratagems.description: Use in your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that has the FLY keyword Falls Back. Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

stratagems.name: Cloudstrike
stratagems.description: Use at the start of the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase. Target one AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that has the FLY keyword and is currently in Strategic Reserves. Set up your unit anywhere on the battlefield using the rules for Deep Strike. Your unit cannot declare a charge this turn.

stratagems.name: Soulsight
stratagems.description: Use in your Shooting phase, when an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase is selected to shoot. Until the end of the phase, each time your unit is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll and one Damage roll made for a model in your unit.

stratagems.name: Anti-grav Repulsion
stratagems.description: Use in your opponent's Charge phase, just after an enemy unit declares a charge that targets an AELDARI VEHICLE unit from your army that has the FLY keyword. Until the end of the phase, subtract 2 from Charge rolls made for that enemy unit.

enhancements.name: Guiding Presence
enhancements.description: AELDARI PSYKER model only. At the start of your Shooting phase, select one friendly AELDARI VEHICLE model within 9" of the bearer. Until the end of the phase, each time that model makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Guileful Strategist
enhancements.description: AELDARI model only. After both players have deployed their armies, select up to three AELDARI VEHICLE units from your army and redeploy them. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Harmonisation Matrix
enhancements.description: AELDARI model only. In your Command phase, if the bearer (or any TRANSPORT it is embarked within) is within range of an objective marker you control, roll one D6: on a 3+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Spirit Stone of Raelyth
enhancements.description: AELDARI PSYKER model only. While the bearer is within 3" of one or more friendly AELDARI VEHICLE units, the bearer has the Lone Operative ability. In your Command phase, you can select one friendly AELDARI VEHICLE model within 3" of the bearer. That model regains up to D3 lost wounds.
